_meta.description: FrontRow virtual theatre — React/Three.js 3D stage with LiveKit WebRTC streaming and Socket.IO show management
_meta.stateInspection: window.__frontrow_state__ — always available when ?diag=true or after first render
_meta.diagPanel: ?diag=true adds DiagnosticsPanel with data-testid selectors for socket, show state, role, seat, streams

quickModes.performer: ?mode=performer&diag=true — skips form, auto-camera, shows GO LIVE NOW button
quickModes.watch: ?mode=watch&diag=true — skips form, auto-picks seat, connects to live show

stateSchema.socketConnected: boolean — true when Socket.IO is connected to VPS backend
stateSchema.hasPerformerStream: boolean — true when performer LiveKit video stream is active
stateSchema.hasUserStream: boolean — true when local camera stream active
stateSchema.audienceSeats: array of {seatId, name, captureMode, socketId, hasLiveStream}
stateSchema.audienceStreamCount: number — performer sees N audience camera streams
stateSchema.timestamp: number — epoch ms of last state update

jsHelpers.waitSocket: await new Promise(r => { const c = () => { const s=window.__frontrow_state__; if(s?.socketConnected) r(s); else setTimeout(c,300); }; c(); })
jsHelpers.waitLive: await new Promise(r => { const c = () => { const s=window.__frontrow_state__; if(s?.showState==='live') r(s); else setTimeout(c,300); }; c(); })
jsHelpers.waitPerformerStream: await new Promise((r,rej) => { let n=0; const c = () => { const s=window.__frontrow_state__; if(s?.hasPerformerStream) r(s); else if(++n>60) rej('timeout'); else setTimeout(c,500); }; c(); })
jsHelpers.waitSeat: await new Promise(r => { const c = () => { const s=window.__frontrow_state__; if(s?.selectedSeat) r(s); else setTimeout(c,300); }; c(); })
